financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well financially with steady profits and good cash management.
They are wisely investing in growing their production and improving technology.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: The company is good at managing currency risks from buying and selling in different countries, but political issues can still cause problems.
They are improving their defenses against cyber attacks, but as these threats get smarter, the risk remains high.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its resources well.
They also have strong leadership and fair practices, which makes them trustworthy and reliable.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is in a strong financial position because it doesn't owe much money and has plenty of cash available.
It has a good plan for using its money wisely, giving profits back to investors while saving enough for future growth.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Excellent
bullets: The company did a great job explaining how it reached a big production milestone, showing strong performance.
They could improve by sharing more details about future financial plans and spending to help investors understand what's next.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: Maruti Suzuki has a clear plan to grow both in India and internationally, which is why it scored high.
The company is ready to face future challenges with strong partnerships and a focus on new opportunities.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well financially and is planning for future growth by focusing on new and eco-friendly products.
There are some risks like supply issues and regulation changes, but overall, the company is in a good position to grow.
